ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "geoid" REAL /* GEOID of the county */,
  "year" REAL /* Year of the data */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "urban_rural_status" TEXT /* Status of the county (urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "renter_occupied_households" REAL /* Number of renter-occupied households */,
  "pct_renter_occupied" REAL /* Percentage of renter-occupied households */,
  "median_gross_rent" REAL /* Median gross rent */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "pct_children" REAL /* Percentage of the population under 18 */,
  "pct_seniors" REAL /* Percentage of the population over 65 */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the ethnicity data belongs to */,
  "pct_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "pct_am_ind" REAL /* Percentage of American Indian population */,
  "pct_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "pct_nh_pi" REAL /* Percentage of Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander population */,
  "pct_multiple" REAL /* Percentage of multiple ethnicities */,
  "pct_other" REAL /* Percentage of other ethnicities */,
  "pct_white" REAL /* Percentage of white population */,
  "pct_black" REAL /* Percentage of black population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ethnicities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evictions" (
  "eviction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eviction entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the eviction data belongs to */,
  "eviction_filings" INTEGER /* Number of eviction filings */,
  "evictions" INTEGER /* Number of evictions */,
  "eviction_rate" REAL /* Eviction rate */,
  "eviction_filing_rate" REAL /* Eviction filing rate */,
  "pct_former_evictions" REAL /* Percentage of households that have experienced eviction */,
  "avg_days_to_eviction" REAL /* Average number of days from filing to eviction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eviction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evictions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date for user activity tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic analysis, eviction trends) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* Sources of data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
